af_score_components.notes: Android Puppeteer MCP. Has MCP. Browser automation for Android. Documentation good. No auth. Rate limits for automation. Android testing focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local device automation. Browser context (could expose PII). APK modification risks. No auth (trust device).

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Puppeteer reliability (Chromium). Device stability. Suitable for Android browser testing.

af_score_components.notes: Andru Intelligence MCP. Has MCP. AI agent framework. Documentation moderate. Auth varies. Rate limits. Early stage.

security_score_components.security_notes: Agent framework (execution risk). Auth model unclear. Secret handling undocumented.

af_score_components.notes: Ani MCP (anime/animation?). Has MCP. Unclear purpose. Documentation limited. Early stage.
AniList MCP. Has MCP (quality 75). Anime/manga database integration. Documentation good. OAuth2 or API key. Rate limits clear. Entertainment focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. AniList auth (OAuth2 or token). Anime data (public but user lists sensitive). Fine-grained scoping.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: AniList API stable. Suitable for anime database automation.

af_score_components.notes: anima (generic). No MCP. Documentation sparse. Purpose unclear. Early stage.
anirbanbasu-frankfur (unclear naming). No MCP. Documentation minimal. Early stage.
Anirbanbasu PyMCP. Has MCP. Python-based. Documentation limited. Early stage.
Anki MCP. Has MCP. Flashcard learning platform. Documentation good. No auth (local). Rate limits. Education focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool (no network). Study data stored locally. No encryption documented. Filesystem permissions apply.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Anki is mature learning tool. Suitable for study automation.

af_score_components.notes: Anki MCP Desktop. Has MCP. Desktop version of Anki integration. Documentation good. No auth. Rate limits. Learning focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. Study data local. No network exposure.

af_score_components.notes: Anki MCP Server. Has MCP. Server version for network access. Documentation good. No auth (local). Rate limits. Learning platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Network accessible. No built-in auth (network risk). Study data exposed. Security hardening needed.
